content.en:
The Void River Boundary Array is a formation that can isolate any perception, exploration, and even snooping in time and space, and it is legendary that the Lord of the Realm can find and spy on enemies through time and space.

For example, Ye Tian used the way of snooping into the past to find other half-step Legendary Realm Lords, so as to lock on to the other party.

But once the other party is in the Void River Boundary Array, even the Legendary Realm Lord will not be able to spy here, unless it is the peak Legendary Realm Lord can forcibly break the shield of the Void River Boundary Array.

However, under normal circumstances, very few Legendary Realm Lords would build the Void River Boundary Array for several reasons.

First, the construction of the Void River Boundary Array was very costly, and it required a lot of materials, so many Legendary Realm lords were reluctant to do so.

Second, the Void River Boundary Array is only shielding and probing, but if the enemy knows the location of the Void River Boundary Array, there is no need to probe and snoop, and he can directly kill the door, so the construction of the Void River Boundary Array is not of much significance, which is also the reason why the Legendary Realm Lord is unwilling to build it.

It's like the Lord of the Trick Star, he didn't build the Void River Boundary Array, if he established such a big array in the Trick Star Tower, 08 would be meaningless.

If such a large array is established in a very remote place, and the main body is hidden in it, it will have an effect and make it impossible for people to find it.

But what's the point?

Does the Lord of the Legendary Realm still need to hide?

Under normal circumstances, it would be difficult for a Legendary Realm Lord to fall.

Unless he was hunted down and killed by many Legendary Realm Lords, he would not have built such a Void River Boundary Array.

There is also the most important third point, the Void River Boundary Array has a major flaw.

Any formation has flaws, and the Void River Boundary Array is naturally no exception, and its biggest flaw is defense, and the top half-step Legendary Realm Lord can break the Void River Boundary Array

Because of this, the Void River Boundary Array is not so common.

Only a very small number of Legendary Realm Lords have secrets and do not want other Legendary Realm Lords to snoop on, or the secret treasury and important places of some forces, will establish the Void River Boundary Array.

The Void River Boundary Array here in Heishui Mountain has a great possibility of isolating the outside world from the prying eyes of the three thousand kites

"Although the Void River Boundary Array has the disadvantage of weak defense, with the other party's caution, maybe there is more than one formation, maybe there are other formations inside, but it should not be more than three formations, otherwise many formations will be superimposed, and the effect of the Void River Boundary Formation will be blocked. "

"First comprehend this Void River Boundary Array, each Void River Boundary Array is different, and if you realize some mysteries, it is easy to easily break through this formation, and when the time comes, you can easily break into it and steal three thousand kites. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian slowly spied on the mystery of the formation, which did not arouse the vigilance of the Blackwater Lord, after all, there were many members of the Blackwater Mountain who were curious here, and it was not a big deal to snoop once in a while.

Besides, Ye Tian's snooping is very hidden, so naturally it doesn't matter.

In a flash, another long time has passed

At this time, after Ye Tian's comprehension, he had almost understood the mystery of this Void River Boundary Array, if the Black Water Lord was not here, he would have easily entered this Great Array.

"It's time to go find the Frostless Lord and the Dragongu Lord. "

Ye Tian decided.

There is no holy place.

Another copy of Ye Tian's body came to find the Frostless Lord.

Inside the main hall.

Ye Tian sat there with the Frostless Lord.

"Endless Lord, you seem to have something to do with me, right?" said Lord Frostless.

"The Frostless Lord should know about the Blackwater Lord's past, he is a traitor to Moshan, can the Frostless Lord know about this?" Ye Tian asked.

"Lord Blackwater, I don't know much, I heard that it is indeed related to Moshan, but it is not a traitor, so I don't know. Lord Frostless said.

Immediately, she asked curiously, "Endless Lord, you suddenly mentioned what the Blackwater Lord did, could it be that you provoked him, he is not easy to provoke." "

"Naturally, it's not to provoke him, but to provoke him. Ye Tian immediately revealed: "There is a treasure in Moshan called the Iris, also called the Three Thousand Iris. "

As he spoke, Ye Tian embodied the appearance of the three thousand kites.

"The Three Thousand Kite Forests are very precious treasures for the Legendary Realm Lords, they cannot be refined, they cannot be stored in any Void Balls and the Inner World, etc., they can only be stored in the Eternal Sea Heaven and Earth and the Void Region. A long time ago, the Lord of Blackwater defected to Moshan and stole three thousand kites, only to become so powerful step by step. "

"The preciousness of the Three Thousand Kite Lynns, even the Peak Legendary Realm Lord may be interested. "

Ye Tian said.

"Three thousand kites, I haven't heard of it, where did you get the information, is it true?" asked the frostless lord.

After all, there are too many rumors, and it would be unwise to offend a Legendary Realm Lord for the sake of a rumor.

"This information comes from the Mofeng Lord of Moshan, who left a message before he died. I also doubt the truth or falsehood.I personally went to Heishui Mountain to investigate, and I have been snooping for a long time as a member of Heishui Mountain, there is a territory in Heishui Mountain that no member is allowed to enter, and it is a place where only the Heishui Lord himself can enter, and the Void River Boundary Array is arranged. "

"Moreover, I have also studied the past of the Black Water Lord, the Black Water Lord was indeed a member of Moshan, although he was also very demonic, but his cultivation at the beginning was normal, but he became the peak Transcendence Realm Lord, and after entering the high-level ranks of Moshan, it didn't take long for him to become a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, and he controlled time first at a speed far beyond other half-step Legendary Realm Lords, and became a Legendary Realm Lord. One day after that, he suddenly defected and left Moshan, and disappeared for a long time, and after 150, the lord of Moshan suddenly appeared again, united with some Legendary Realm lords, and destroyed Moshan. "

"After this information, I can have an eighty percent or even ninety percent chance to guarantee that the Black Water Lord is afraid that there are really three thousand kites!!"

Ye Tian reasoned.

The Frostless Lord was silent for a long time and asked, "What are you going to do?"

Ye Tian said his plan: "I am going to use the members of Heishui Mountain to kill the clones of some legendary lords of the True Void Holy Land, causing conflicts, and then several legendary realm lords of the True Void Holy Land will attack the Black Water Mountain, so that the clones and bodies of the Black Water Lord will all be dispatched, it is impossible to kill the Black Water Lord, the other party is very powerful, so he only needs to be dragged down." Then, I infiltrated the Void River Boundary Array and stole 3,000 kites. Legend has it that the Lord of the Realm will be valued by the Lord of Blackwater, so it will be difficult to steal it, but I have a good chance of stealing three thousand kites. If it is successful, the three thousand kites will be able to return to the True Immortal Realm, which is enough to cultivate multiple Legendary Realm Lords, and even allow the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Innocent Land to create supreme skills, and maybe one day in the future, a peak Legendary Realm Lord can be born. "

"I need to counsel with the other Lords of the Legendary Realm, after all, I am far from being a match for the Lord of Blackwater. "

The Frostless Lord said.

"Well, then I'll wait for news from Lord Frostless. "

Ye Tian nodded. _
